decantr/core.description: DOM engine — hyperscript rendering, conditional, list, mount, lifecycle

decantr/state.description: Reactive primitives — signals, effects, memos, stores, batch

decantr/router.description: Client-side routing — hash or history mode

decantr/components.description: UI components — all return HTMLElement, all accept inline styles

decantr/tags.description: Proxy-based tag functions for concise markup
decantr/tags.usage: import { tags } from 'decantr/tags'; const { div, p } = tags; div({ class: 'card' }, p('Content'))

decantr/icons.description: First-party icon suite — undefined Lucide icons via CSS mask-image

archetypes.description: Domain archetypes for the Decantation Process — pre-mapped page patterns, organs, and layouts per domain

ecommerce-admin.description: Merchant admin panel for e-commerce operations

patterns.description: Experience patterns — composable UI building blocks that archetypes reference

recipes.description: Visual language recipes — composition rules for drastic visual transformations beyond token-level styling

auradecantism.description: Glass panels, gradient text, mesh backgrounds — the default Decantr visual language

clean.description: Minimal borders, subtle shadows, neutral palette — understated professional aesthetic

launchpad.description: Clean ShadCN/Tailwind aesthetic — zinc palette, violet accent, thin borders, subtle shadows

gaming-guild.description: Gaming community aesthetic — neon accents, card frames, rank badges, achievement unlocks

atoms.description: Atomic CSS utility classes — categorized prefix groups

tokens.description: Design tokens derived from style seeds — 170+ CSS custom properties

foundations.description: Foundation modules — core, state, router, form
